body.title: Move budget.py to utility_closet/budget as rack shelf
body.result: Partial shim landed (44db598a): lab/utility_closet/budget.py re-exports from wild_igor/igor/tools/budget.py. UC path exists for new callers. Full inversion (UC becomes canonical) deferred to T-uc-registry-move — circular import until Tool/registry migrate too. Migration plan documented in UC module's docstring per T-docs-live-in-code.
body.description:
Last-but-one piece of T-uc-module-migration-epic. Move wild_igor/igor/tools/budget.py into lab/utility_closet/budget/ as a rack shelf (BudgetShelf with RackModule interface and health endpoint).

## Scope
- Create lab/utility_closet/budget/ directory with shelf module
- Move budget.py code; rename internals if needed
- Register as UC rack module with health reporting (balance, last check time, burn rate)
- Add comms://log/budget channel for audit (every balance check, every alert)
- Thin facade or re-export shim at wild_igor/igor/tools/budget.py during transition — don't break callers
- Tests pass at both old and new import paths
- Update memory palace pointers if any reference the old path

## Callers
- cognition/cloud_mode.py uses budget.fetch_openrouter_balance (we touched this today)
- tools/bootstrap_reader.py imports from .budget
- HeartbeatSource (check_burn_trajectory)

## Success criteria
- Existing budget-related tests still pass
- `from wild_igor.igor.tools.budget import ...` still works (shim)
- `from lab.utility_closet.budget import ...` is the new canonical
- UC health dashboard shows budget shelf

## Related
- T-uc-module-migration-epic (parent)
